# send_password_reset { #socialinfrascorepy.send_password_reset }

```python
send_password_reset(client)
```

Request a password-reset email for the signed-in user.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type     | Description                                                                          | Default    |
|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`sign_in`. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                 |
|--------|--------|---------------------------------------------|
|        | dict   | Parsed response payload from Supabase auth. |

## Raises {.doc-section .doc-section-raises}

| Name   | Type             | Description                                                              |
|--------|------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | SIScorecardError | If the client is not authenticated or the user email cannot be resolved. |
